candidates.text_excerpt: 14 [OMB A-130] requires federal agencies to implement the NIST Risk Management Framework for the selection of controls for federal information systems. [EO 13800] requires federal agencies to implement the NIST Framework for Improving Critical Infrastructure Cybersecurity to manage cybersecurity risk. The NIST frameworks are also available to nonfederal organizations as optional resources.
